definition: A serializable, optionally invertible set of Change Records aligned to JSON Patch (RFC 6902). Forward patches apply a change; inverse patches (carrying oldValue, since RFC 6902 ops are not self-inverting) revert it, enabling undo/replay. Immer and Mutative emit forward + inverse patch pairs.
usage: The transport-friendly representation produced by patch and snapshot Change Strategies. The change-reverted event applies an inverse Change Patch.
